anomalies.name: Current sharing imbalance
anomalies.description: Phase A carries 60% of total load while Phase B carries 40% — 20% imbalance exceeds 5% threshold

anomalies.name: RT hold time degradation
anomalies.description: Ride-through hold time degraded from 50ms to 30ms after 1000 charge/discharge cycles

anomalies.name: PMBus read timeout
anomalies.description: PMBus READ_VOUT transaction times out after 5ms — exceeds 1ms requirement

anomalies.name: I2C bus lockup — stuck SDA
anomalies.description: I2C SDA line stuck LOW, preventing START condition — all bus devices unreachable

anomalies.name: SPI transaction CRC mismatch
anomalies.description: SPI flash read returns data with CRC error — possible signal integrity issue

anomalies.name: GPIO interrupt latency violation
anomalies.description: GPIO PGOOD interrupt takes 8μs to propagate to CPU — exceeds 1μs requirement
